hero.sub: Curated portfolio of exceptional properties across prime European markets. Discreet, bespoke, and entirely client-focused.

about.p1: Founded in Warsaw in 2008, Maison & Co. was born from a single conviction: that every client deserves a real estate experience as refined as the properties themselves.
about.p2: Over sixteen years, we have quietly become the trusted partner of discerning buyers and sellers seeking discretion, expertise, and an unwavering eye for quality.

values.title: Discretion
values.desc: Every transaction handled with absolute confidentiality

values.title: Curation
values.desc: Only properties that meet our exacting standards

values.title: Dedication
values.desc: A single point of contact from first viewing to completion

philosophy.quoteBody: Real estate is not merely the transaction of property — it is the careful stewardship of the places

pillars.title: Trust before transaction
pillars.desc: We invest months — sometimes years — in understanding a client's vision before presenting a single opportunity. The right match matters far more than a swift one.

pillars.title: Quality over quantity
pillars.desc: Our curated portfolio remains deliberately selective. We represent only properties that we would proudly call home ourselves — and nothing less.

pillars.title: Silence as a service
pillars.desc: Many of our most significant transactions never appear in the public record. Discretion is not a policy — it is our deepest professional obligation.

services.subtext: From initial consultation to final handover, our services cover every facet of the premium property journey — tailored to your circumstances and timeline.
services.ctaSub: Schedule a private consultation with one of our advisors.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.desc: We act exclusively on your behalf — identifying off-market opportunities, conducting thorough due diligence, and negotiating terms that reflect your priorities.

items.title: Vendor Advisory
items.desc: Strategic guidance for sellers seeking maximum value with minimum exposure. Discreet marketing, qualified buyer pools, and seamless transaction management.

items.title: Portfolio Management
items.desc: For private clients with multiple assets, we provide ongoing oversight — from maintenance coordination to strategic acquisition and divestment planning.

items.title: Relocation Services
items.desc: Complete relocation support for executives and families moving to new cities. School search, neighbourhood analysis, and settlement assistance included.

items.title: Investment Consultancy
items.desc: Yield analysis, market comparables, and long-term capital growth projections to help investors make informed, confident decisions in prime locations.

items.title: Interior & Renovation
items.desc: Through our trusted network of architects and designers, we connect clients with professionals who share our exacting standards for craft and materials.

contact.sub: Leave your details and one of our advisors will be in touch within one business day.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you're looking for…
contact.successTitle: Your email app should be open
contact.successSub: Complete and send the pre-filled message to reach us directly.

seo.title: Maison & Co. — Luxury Real Estate
seo.description: Exceptional properties for discerning clients. 16 years of trust across prime European markets.
